requirements.behavior: Classify HTTP 500 through 599 as high severity and HTTP 429 as medium severity; ignore blank lines and omit other valid statuses from incidents and rejects.
Sort incident rows by timestamp and emit the required incident columns in order.
Reject non-six-field lines and statuses outside the base-10 100 through 599 range with reason malformed_line, preserving reject input order.
Write exactly summary.json, incidents.csv, and rejects.csv under output/ with the specified schemas.
